title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Look Ahead to Next Round of Talks
summary_full: Iran’s foreign minister said that new negotiations with the United States would start immediately after their preliminary deal is signed on Friday. President Trump said he hoped the conflict would soon be in the “rearview mirror.”
